task_2.rationale: Same idempotent precedent as the previous repeated UP8-14 message: when the requested implementation is already on canonical main, re-issuing the slice would create a duplicate commit. Verifying the upstream code against the task's required behaviors is the right action.

out_of_scope_held_throughout: Rewriting OpenSandbox main-helper history to remove the pre-existing PAT-bearing commits

open_followups_observed_but_not_acted_on.summary: Two pre-existing OpenSandbox commits in main-helper ancestry (f9a74b9, 2cf981a76) carry GitHub PATs in their diff. They are not in any tranche shipped through GBC-DESIGN-1 / UP9-1, and they live behind the secret-scanning gate. Cleaning them up is its own slice (history rewrite or scoped revert) and is out-of-scope for both tasks here.
open_followups_observed_but_not_acted_on.kind: external blocker for any future push of main-helper as-is; not a blocker for the published feat/GBC-DESIGN-1-clean-ancestry branch

next_slice_recommendation: ultra-plan-9-generated-build-contract-phase-2-template-rendering-python-only — generate the python-uvicorn-distroless-v1 Dockerfile from a detector artifact, write it to .amof/generated-builds/<repo>/<service>/Dockerfile, and update the artifact's dockerfile_template.rendered_path. No build proof yet; the proof ladder still tops out at proposed. Other families remain refused. UI/API still untouched.
